description: Environment setup - verify baseline build and tests pass, install any needed tools
steps: Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && dotnet restore src/CdkBase.sln' to confirm package restore works
Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln' to confirm clean build
Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal' to confirm all 129 C# tests pass
Run 'pyenv global 3.12.13 && pip install pytest boto3 -q' then 'cd src/CdkBase/lambda/process_audio && python -m pytest test_index.py -v' to confirm all 19 Python tests pass
Run 'unset NODE_OPTIONS && npx cdk synth' to confirm CDK synthesis works
acceptance_criteria: dotnet test reports 129 passing tests with 0 failures
pytest reports 19 passing tests with 0 failures
cdk synth produces CloudFormation template output without errors
verification: unset NODE_OPTIONS && dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal
